name: wan-show-floatplane-client
author: Scott
description: Unofficial Linux-first desktop client for watching the WAN Show from Floatplane with optional background auto-watch scheduling.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.dev:desktop: npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop && env ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 electron --no-sandbox apps/desktop/dist/apps/desktop/src/main.js
scripts.dev:desktop:background: npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop && env ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 electron --no-sandbox apps/desktop/dist/apps/desktop/src/main.js --background
scripts.dev:desktop:simulate-live: npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop && env ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 electron --no-sandbox apps/desktop/dist/apps/desktop/src/main.js --background --simulate-live-launch
scripts.dev:desktop:simulate-reauth: npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop && env ELECTRON_DISABLE_SANDBOX=1 electron --no-sandbox apps/desktop/dist/apps/desktop/src/main.js --background --simulate-reauth
scripts.build: npm run build:server && npm run build:web && npm run build:desktop
scripts.dist:linux: npm run build && electron-builder --linux AppImage --publish never
